title: Can Speaker ignore TMC's choice for Leader of Opposition? Calcutta High Court to decide
description: The Calcutta High Court is slated to decide if the Speaker of a Legislative Assembly can ignore an opposition political party's pick for Leader of Opposition (LoP) in a dispute involving the recognition rebel Trinamool Congress (TMC) MLA Ritabrata Banerjee as the LoP in the 18th West Bengal Legislative Assembly [Sobhandeb Chattopadhyay v Hon’ble Speaker, West Bengal Legislative Assembly and Others].The Speaker's decision to declare Banerjee as the LoP has been challenged by TMC MLA Sobhandeb Cha
